scripts.build: web-ext build --source-dir . --ignore-files node_modules/** .idea/** icons/source/** CLAUDE.md SPEC.md eslint.config.js package.json package-lock.json .prettierrc.json --overwrite-dest
scripts.sign: source .env && web-ext sign --api-key=$AMO_API_KEY --api-secret=$AMO_API_SECRET --channel unlisted --source-dir . --ignore-files node_modules/** .idea/** icons/source/** CLAUDE.md SPEC.md eslint.config.js package.json package-lock.json .prettierrc.json
scripts.format: prettier --write src/content_script.js src/background.js src/popup.js src/reports.js src/bot_analysis.js src/verdict.js
scripts.lint: eslint src/content_script.js src/background.js src/popup.js src/reports.js src/bot_analysis.js src/verdict.js
